name: iEagle
overview: A group of high school students, inspired by their school-ran show EETV, start their own webshow in retaliation. The show documents their adventures throughout their high school years and their run ins with the incredible, uncanny, and supernatural.  Episodes are typically split into two main segments, with the first being a live-action story and the latter half following a loosely animated series with Brody (starting as a 12th grader), a rude bald eagle who wears backwards hats, and Brian (starting as a 9th grader), a timid white Labrador who tags along with Brody any chance he gets.

trailers.title: iEagle Season 4: THE FINAL SEASON | Official Trailer
